javascript:!function(){function e(e){const t=e.querySelectorAll("tr").length?e.querySelectorAll("tr"):e.querySelectorAll('[role="row"]');return Array.from(t).map(function(e){const t=e.querySelectorAll("td,th").length?e.querySelectorAll("td,th"):e.querySelectorAll('[role="gridcell"]');return Array.from(t).map(function(e){return t=e.innerText,String(t||"").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim();var t})}).filter(function(e){return e.length})}function t(e){return String(null==e?"":e).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;")}const n=[],o=[];let a=!1,s=!1,i=null;function r(e,t,o){n.push({status:e,test:t,details:o||"",time:(new Date).toLocaleTimeString(),url:location.href,route:location.hash||""})}function l(e,t,n){const o=new Blob([t],{type:n}),a=document.createElement("a");a.href=URL.createObjectURL(o),a.download=e,document.body.appendChild(a),a.click(),setTimeout(function(){URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),a.remove()},500)}function c(e){const t="string"==typeof e?e:JSON.stringify(e);return'"'+String(t).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"'}function d(e){if(!e||1!==e.nodeType)return"";if(e.id)return"#"+e.id;const t=[];for(;e&&1===e.nodeType&&e!==document.body;){let n=e.nodeName.toLowerCase();if(e.className&&"string"==typeof e.className){const t=e.className.trim().split(/\s+/).slice(0,2).join(".");t&&(n+="."+t)}const o=e.parentNode;if(o){const t=Array.from(o.children).filter(function(t){return t.nodeName===e.nodeName});if(t.length>1){n+=":nth-of-type("+(t.indexOf(e)+1)+")"}}t.unshift(n),e=e.parentNode}return t.join(" > ")}function u(e){e&&(i&&i!==e&&(i.style.outline=i.__skynetOldOutline||"",i.style.outlineOffset=i.__skynetOldOutlineOffset||""),e.__skynetOldOutline=e.style.outline,e.__skynetOldOutlineOffset=e.style.outlineOffset,e.style.outline="3px solid #ff3b3b",e.style.outlineOffset="2px",i=e,setTimeout(function(){e===i&&(e.style.outline=e.__skynetOldOutline||"",e.style.outlineOffset=e.__skynetOldOutlineOffset||"")},1400))}async function p(e,t,n){const o={selector:e||"",url:location.href,route:location.hash||"",viewport:{width:window.innerWidth,height:window.innerHeight},timestamp:(new Date).toISOString(),extra:n||{}};if(t&&(o.html=(t.outerHTML||"").slice(0,2e3),o.text=(t.innerText||t.textContent||"").slice(0,1e3)),window.html2canvas)try{const e=await window.html2canvas(document.body,{useCORS:!0,logging:!1,backgroundColor:"#ffffff"});o.screenshot=e.toDataURL("image/png")}catch(e){o.screenshotError=String(e)}else o.screenshotError="html2canvas not loaded - run await skynet.loadScreenshotSupport()";return o}function f(e){a&&o.push({...e,time:(new Date).toLocaleTimeString(),route:location.hash||"",url:location.href})}function h(){const e=["async function recordedTest(){","  try {"];return o.forEach(function(t){e.push("    "+t.code)}),e.push("    skynet.report();"),e.push("  } catch (error) {"),e.push('    console.error("Recorded test failed:", error);'),e.push("  }"),e.push("}"),e.push(""),e.push("recordedTest();"),e.join("\n")}function m(){if(document.getElementById("skynet-terminator-mode"))return;const e=document.createElement("div");e.id="skynet-terminator-mode",e.style.cssText="position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.94);z-index:9999999;overflow:hidden;font-family:Consolas,monospace;color:#ff3b3b;";const t=document.createElement("div");t.style.cssText="position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:30px;";const n=document.createElement("div");n.style.cssText="position:relative;width:220px;height:220px;";const o=document.createElement("div");o.style.cssText="position:absolute;inset:0;border:3px solid rgba(255,59,59,.45);border-radius:50%;animation:skynetRotate 4s linear infinite;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,0,0,.35);";const a=document.createElement("div");a.style.cssText="position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,#ffd0d0 0,#ff4a4a 12%,#ff0000 28%,#450000 45%,#0c0000 65%,transparent 68%);box-shadow:0 0 18px #ff0000,0 0 50px rgba(255,0,0,.9),inset 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.25);animation:skynetPulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;";const s=document.createElement("div");s.innerText="SKYNET",s.style.cssText="font-size:64px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:6px;text-shadow:0 0 20px #ff0000;";const i=document.createElement("div");i.innerText="TERMINATOR MODE ACTIVATED",i.style.cssText="font-size:24px;letter-spacing:4px;color:#ff9c9c;";const r=document.createElement("div");if(r.innerText="TARGET LOCK • AUTOMATION ONLINE",r.style.cssText="font-size:14px;color:#ff7777;letter-spacing:2px;",n.appendChild(o),n.appendChild(a),t.appendChild(n),t.appendChild(s),t.appendChild(i),t.appendChild(r),e.appendChild(t),!document.getElementById("skynet-terminator-style")){const e=document.createElement("style");e.id="skynet-terminator-style",e.textContent="@keyframes skynetPulse{0%,100%{opacity:.75;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)}50%{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.08)}}@keyframes skynetRotate{from{transform:rotate(0deg)}to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}",document.head.appendChild(e)}document.body.appendChild(e),setTimeout(function(){e.remove()},4e3)}window.skynet={results:n,recordedActions:o,report:function(){const e=n.filter(function(e){return"PASS"===e.status}).length,o=n.filter(function(e){return"FAIL"===e.status}).length,a=n.length,s=a?Math.round(e/a*100):0,i=a?Math.round(o/a*100):0,r=window.open("","_blank");if(!r)return void console.error("❌ FAIL - popup blocked for report tab");const l=n.map(function(e,n){const o="string"==typeof e.details?e.details:JSON.stringify(e.details,null,2),a=e.details&&"object"==typeof e.details&&e.details.screenshot?'<div style="margin-top:8px"><a href="'+e.details.screenshot+'" target="_blank"><img src="'+e.details.screenshot+'" style="max-width:220px;border:1px solid #4a1717;border-radius:8px" /></a></div>':"";return"<tr><td>"+(n+1)+'</td><td style="color:'+("PASS"===e.status?"#7CFFB2":"#ff6b6b")+';font-weight:bold">'+t(e.status)+"</td><td>"+t(e.test)+'</td><td><pre style="white-space:pre-wrap;margin:0;font-family:inherit">'+t(o)+"</pre>"+a+"</td><td>"+t(e.time)+"</td></tr>"}).join(""),c=t(JSON.stringify(n,null,2)),d=t([["status","test","details","time","url"].join(",")].concat(n.map(function(e){return[e.status,e.test,"string"==typeof e.details?e.details:JSON.stringify(e.details),e.time,e.url].map(function(e){return'"'+String(e).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"'}).join(",")})).join("\n"));r.document.write(`\n<!doctype html>\n<html>\n<head>\n  <meta charset="utf-8">\n  <title>SKYNET SYSTEM REPORT</title>\n  <style>\n    body{margin:0;background:#070707;color:#ffd7d7;font-family:Consolas,Monaco,monospace}\n    .wrap{padding:24px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}\n    h1{margin:0 0 8px;color:#ff3b3b;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,0,0,.7)}\n    .sub{color:#ff9c9c;margin-bottom:18px}\n    .top{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:stretch;flex-wrap:wrap}\n    .card{background:#120909;border:1px solid #5a1919;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(255,0,0,.18),inset 0 0 20px rgba(255,0,0,.06);padding:18px}\n    .stats{min-width:260px;flex:1}\n    .stats .num{font-size:34px;color:#fff}\n    .stats .row{margin:10px 0;color:#ffb0b0}\n    .chart{min-width:320px;flex:1.3}\n    .barbox{margin-top:12px}\n    .barlabel{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:13px;margin:8px 0 4px;color:#ffb0b0}\n    .bar{height:18px;background:#220c0c;border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #4a1717}\n    .fill-pass{height:100%;width:${s}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#3ddc97,#7CFFB2);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(124,255,178,.35)}\n    .fill-fail{height:100%;width:${i}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff4d4d,#ff8a8a);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,106,106,.35)}\n    .pieWrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap}\n    .donut{width:170px;height:170px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(#7CFFB2 0 ${s}%, #ff6b6b ${s}% 100%);position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,0,0,.18)}\n    .donut:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:28px;background:#120909;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #4a1717}\n    .centerText{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;font-weight:bold;z-index:1}\n    .centerText b{font-size:28px;color:#fff}\n    .legend div{margin:8px 0}\n    .legend .pass::before,.legend .fail::before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;margin-right:8px}\n    .legend .pass::before{background:#7CFFB2}\n    .legend .fail::before{background:#ff6b6b}\n    .btns{margin:18px 0 14px;display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}\n    button{background:#ff3b3b;color:#1a0000;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,0,0,.25)}\n    button.secondary{background:#1b1010;color:#ffd7d7;border:1px solid #5a1919}\n    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:#100909;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden}\n    th,td{border:1px solid #3d1414;padding:10px;vertical-align:top;text-align:left}\n    th{background:#1f0c0c;color:#ff6969}\n    tr:nth-child(even){background:#0d0808}\n    pre{max-width:640px;overflow:auto}\n    .muted{color:#b58484;margin-top:12px}\n    textarea{width:100%;min-height:180px;background:#0c0606;color:#ffd7d7;border:1px solid #4a1717;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-family:Consolas,monospace}\n    .panel{display:none}\n    .panel.active{display:block}\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class="wrap">\n    <h1>SKYNET SYSTEM REPORT</h1>\n    <div class="sub">Automation diagnostic summary</div>\n\n    <div class="top">\n      <div class="card stats">\n        <div class="num">${a}</div>\n        <div>Total tests</div>\n        <div class="row">PASS: <b style="color:#7CFFB2">${e}</b></div>\n        <div class="row">FAIL: <b style="color:#ff6b6b">${o}</b></div>\n        <div class="row">URL: ${t(location.href)}</div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div class="card chart">\n        <div class="pieWrap">\n          <div class="donut">\n            <div class="centerText"><b>${a}</b><span>Total</span></div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="legend">\n            <div class="pass">PASS: ${e} (${s}%)</div>\n            <div class="fail">FAIL: ${o} (${i}%)</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class="barbox">\n          <div class="barlabel"><span>PASS</span><span>${s}%</span></div>\n          <div class="bar"><div class="fill-pass"></div></div>\n\n          <div class="barlabel"><span>FAIL</span><span>${i}%</span></div>\n          <div class="bar"><div class="fill-fail"></div></div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class="btns">\n      <button onclick="window.print()">Print / Save PDF</button>\n      <button onclick="downloadJSON()">Export JSON</button>\n      <button onclick="downloadCSV()">Export CSV</button>\n      <button onclick="showTab('table')" class="secondary">Table</button>\n      <button onclick="showTab('json')" class="secondary">JSON</button>\n      <button onclick="showTab('csv')" class="secondary">CSV</button>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id="panel-table" class="panel active">\n      <table>\n        <thead>\n          <tr>\n            <th>#</th>\n            <th>Status</th>\n            <th>Test</th>\n            <th>Details</th>\n            <th>Time</th>\n          </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody>${l}</tbody>\n      </table>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id="panel-json" class="panel">\n      <textarea readonly>${c}</textarea>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id="panel-csv" class="panel">\n      <textarea readonly>${d}</textarea>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class="muted">Generated by SKYNET automation helper.</div>\n  </div>\n\n  <script>\n    const jsonPayload = ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(n,null,2))};\n    const csvPayload = ${JSON.stringify([["status","test","details","time","url"].join(",")].concat(n.map(function(e){return[e.status,e.test,"string"==typeof e.details?e.details:JSON.stringify(e.details),e.time,e.url].map(function(e){return'"'+String(e).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"'}).join(",")})).join("\n"))};\n\n    function dl(name, content, type) {\n      const blob = new Blob([content], { type: type });\n      const link = document.createElement("a");\n      link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      link.download = name;\n      document.body.appendChild(link);\n      link.click();\n\n      setTimeout(function () {\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(link.href);\n        link.remove();\n      }, 500);\n    }\n\n    function downloadJSON() {\n      dl("skynet-report.json", jsonPayload, "application/json");\n    }\n\n    function downloadCSV() {\n      dl("skynet-report.csv", csvPayload, "text/csv;charset=utf-8");\n    }\n\n    function showTab(name) {\n      document.querySelectorAll(".panel").forEach(function (panel) {\n        panel.classList.remove("active");\n      });\n\n      document.getElementById("panel-" + name).classList.add("active");\n    }\n  <\/script>\n</body>\n</html>\n    `),r.document.close()},exportJSON:function(){l("skynet-report.json",JSON.stringify(n,null,2),"application/json")},exportCSV:function(){l("skynet-report.csv",[["status","test","details","time","url","route"].map(c).join(",")].concat(n.map(function(e){return[e.status,e.test,"string"==typeof e.details?e.details:JSON.stringify(e.details),e.time,e.url,e.route].map(c).join(",")})).join("\n"),"text/csv;charset=utf-8")},waitFor:function(e,t=5e3,n=100){return new Promise(function(o,a){const s=Date.now(),i=setInterval(function(){const n=document.querySelector(e);if(n)return clearInterval(i),console.log("✅ PASS - element found:",e),r("PASS","Wait for "+e,{selector:e,timeout:t,found:!0}),void o(n);Date.now()-s>=t&&(clearInterval(i),console.error("❌ FAIL - wait timeout:",e),r("FAIL","Wait for "+e,{selector:e,timeout:t,found:!1}),a(new Error("Element not found: "+e)))},n)})},loadScreenshotSupport:function(){return new Promise(function(e,t){if(window.html2canvas)return void e(!0);if(document.getElementById("skynet-html2canvas-loader")){const n=document.getElementById("skynet-html2canvas-loader");return n.addEventListener("load",function(){e(!0)}),void n.addEventListener("error",function(){t(new Error("Failed to load html2canvas"))})}const n=document.createElement("script");n.id="skynet-html2canvas-loader",n.src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/html2canvas@1.4.1/dist/html2canvas.min.js",n.onload=function(){console.log("✅ html2canvas loaded"),e(!0)},n.onerror=function(){console.error("❌ Failed to load html2canvas"),t(new Error("Failed to load html2canvas"))},document.head.appendChild(n)})},startRecording:function(){s||(document.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(!a)return;const t=d(e.target);f({type:"click",selector:t,code:"skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(t)+").click();"})},!0),document.addEventListener("change",function(e){if(!a)return;const t=e.target,n=d(t);!t||"INPUT"!==t.tagName&&"TEXTAREA"!==t.tagName&&"SELECT"!==t.tagName||("checkbox"===t.type||"radio"===t.type?f({type:"check",selector:n,value:!!t.checked,code:"skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(n)+").shouldBeChecked("+!!t.checked+");"}):f({type:"type",selector:n,value:t.value,code:"skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(n)+").type("+JSON.stringify(t.value)+");"}))},!0),s=!0),o.length=0,a=!0,console.log("🔴 SKYNET recording started"),r("PASS","Recording started","User action recording enabled")},stopRecording:function(){a=!1,console.log("⏹ SKYNET recording stopped"),r("PASS","Recording stopped",{totalActions:o.length})},exportRecordedTest:function(){const e=h();return l("skynet-recorded-test.js",e,"text/javascript;charset=utf-8"),e},copyRecordedTest:async function(){const e=h();try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText&&document.hasFocus())return await navigator.clipboard.writeText(e),console.log("📋 SKYNET - Recorded test copied to clipboard"),e;console.warn("⚠️ Clipboard API not available or document is not focused")}catch(e){console.warn("⚠️ Clipboard API failed:",e)}try{const t=document.createElement("textarea");t.value=e,t.setAttribute("readonly",""),t.style.position="fixed",t.style.left="-9999px",t.style.top="-9999px",document.body.appendChild(t),t.focus(),t.select();const n=document.execCommand("copy");if(document.body.removeChild(t),n)return console.log("📋 SKYNET - Copied using fallback method"),e}catch(e){console.warn("⚠️ Fallback copy failed:",e)}return window.prompt("Copy your recorded test manually:",e),e},terminator:m,terminate:m,clearResults:function(){n.length=0,o.length=0,console.log("SKYNET results cleared")},get:function(e){const t=document.querySelector(e);return t?function(e,t){return{highlight:function(){return u(t),r("PASS","Element "+e+" highlighted",e),this},click:function(){return console.log("Click:",e),u(t),t.click(),r("PASS","Element "+e+" clicked","click executed"),f({type:"click",selector:e,code:"skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(e)+").click();"}),this},type:function(n){return console.log("Type:",n),u(t),t.value=n,t.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:!0})),t.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:!0})),r("PASS","Element "+e+" typed value",n),f({type:"type",selector:e,value:n,code:"skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(e)+").type("+JSON.stringify(n)+");"}),this},typeLikeUser:async function(n,o=35){if(console.log("Type like user:",n),u(t),!t||!("value"in t)||t.disabled||t.readOnly){console.error("❌ FAIL - element cannot accept typing:",e);const o=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t&&"value"in t?t.value:void 0,assertion:"typeLikeUser",reason:"element cannot accept typing"});return r("FAIL","Element "+e+" typeLikeUser",o),this}try{t.focus(),t.value="",t.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:!0})),t.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:!0}));for(const e of String(n)){const n=1===e.length?e.toUpperCase().charCodeAt(0):0;t.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown",{key:e,code:"Key"+e.toUpperCase(),keyCode:n,which:n,bubbles:!0,cancelable:!0})),t.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keypress",{key:e,code:"Key"+e.toUpperCase(),keyCode:n,which:n,bubbles:!0,cancelable:!0})),t.value+=e,t.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:!0})),t.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keyup",{key:e,code:"Key"+e.toUpperCase(),keyCode:n,which:n,bubbles:!0,cancelable:!0})),o>0&&await new Promise(function(e){setTimeout(e,o)})}return t.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:!0})),r("PASS","Element "+e+" typed like user",{value:n,delay:o}),f({type:"typeLikeUser",selector:e,value:n,code:"await skynet.get("+JSON.stringify(e)+").typeLikeUser("+JSON.stringify(n)+", "+o+");"}),this}catch(o){console.error("❌ FAIL - typeLikeUser failed:",o);const a=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t.value,assertion:"typeLikeUser",error:String(o)});return r("FAIL","Element "+e+" typeLikeUser",a),this}},shouldContainText:async function(n){if(u(t),(t.textContent||"").includes(n))console.log("✅ PASS - text contains:",n),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should contain text",n);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - text does not contain:",n);const o=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t.textContent,assertion:"shouldContainText"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should contain text",o)}return this},shouldBeVisible:async function(){u(t);const n=window.getComputedStyle(t);if("none"!==n.display&&"hidden"!==n.visibility&&null!==t.offsetParent)console.log("✅ PASS - element is visible"),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should be visible",!0);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - element not visible");const n=await p(e,t,{assertion:"shouldBeVisible"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be visible",n)}return this},shouldHaveColor:async function(n){u(t);const o=window.getComputedStyle(t).color;if(o===n)console.log("✅ PASS - color matches:",n),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should have color",n);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - color mismatch",{expected:n,actual:o});const a=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:o,assertion:"shouldHaveColor"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should have color",a)}return this},shouldExist:function(){return t?(console.log("✅ PASS - element exists"),r("PASS","Element "+e+" exists",!0)):(console.error("❌ FAIL - element does not exist"),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" exists",!1)),this},shouldHaveText:async function(n){if(u(t),(t.textContent||"")===n)console.log("✅ PASS - text equals:",n),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should have text",n);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - text not equal:",n);const o=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t.textContent,assertion:"shouldHaveText"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should have text",o)}return this},shouldContainValue:async function(n){if(u(t),String(t.value||"").includes(n))console.log("✅ PASS - value contains:",n),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should contain value",n);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - value does not contain:",n);const o=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t.value,assertion:"shouldContainValue"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should contain value",o)}return this},shouldHaveValue:async function(n){if(u(t),t.value===n)console.log("✅ PASS - value equals:",n),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should have value",n);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - value not equal:",n);const o=await p(e,t,{expected:n,actual:t.value,assertion:"shouldHaveValue"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should have value",o)}return this},shouldBeChecked:async function(n){u(t);const o="boolean"!=typeof n||n;if(t.checked===o)console.log("✅ PASS - checked equals:",o),r("PASS","Element "+e+" checked state",o);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - checked not equal:",{expected:o,actual:t.checked});const n=await p(e,t,{expected:o,actual:t.checked,assertion:"shouldBeChecked"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" checked state",n)}return this},shouldBeTrue:async function(){if(u(t),!0===t.checked)console.log("✅ PASS - checked is true"),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should be checked",!0);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - checked is not true",{actual:t.checked});const n=await p(e,t,{expected:!0,actual:t.checked,assertion:"shouldBeTrue"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be checked",n)}return this},shouldBeFalse:async function(){if(u(t),!1===t.checked)console.log("✅ PASS - checked is false"),r("PASS","Element "+e+" should be unchecked",!1);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - checked is not false",{actual:t.checked});const n=await p(e,t,{expected:!1,actual:t.checked,assertion:"shouldBeFalse"});r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be unchecked",n)}return this}}}(e,t):function(e){return{highlight:function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" highlight",{expected:"found",actual:"not found"}),this},click:function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" exists",{expected:"found",actual:"not found"}),this},type:function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" exists",{expected:"found",actual:"not found"}),this},typeLikeUser:async function(t,n){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" typeLikeUser",{expected:t,delay:n,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldContainText:async function(t){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should contain text",{expected:t,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldBeVisible:async function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be visible",{expected:"visible",actual:"not found"}),this},shouldExist:function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element does not exist:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should exist",{expected:"exists",actual:"not found"}),this},shouldHaveText:async function(t){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should have text",{expected:t,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldContainValue:async function(t){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should contain value",{expected:t,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldHaveValue:async function(t){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should have value",{expected:t,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldBeChecked:async function(t){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" checked state",{expected:t,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldBeTrue:async function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be checked",{expected:!0,actual:"not found"}),this},shouldBeFalse:async function(){return console.error("❌ FAIL - element not found:",e),r("FAIL","Element "+e+" should be unchecked",{expected:!1,actual:"not found"}),this}}}(e)},table:function(t){const n=document.querySelector(t);return{highlight:function(){return n?(u(n),r("PASS","Table "+t+" highlighted",t)):r("FAIL","Table "+t+" highlighted",{expected:"found",actual:"not found"}),this},shouldMatchData:async function(o){if(!n)return console.error("❌ FAIL - table not found:",t),r("FAIL","Table "+t+" should exist",{expected:"found",actual:"not found"}),this;u(n);const a=e(n);var s,i;if(s=a,i=o,JSON.stringify(s)===JSON.stringify(i))console.log("✅ PASS - table matches expected data"),r("PASS","Table "+t+" should match data",o);else{console.error("❌ FAIL - table mismatch",{expected:o,actual:a});const e=await p(t,n,{expected:o,actual:a,assertion:"table.shouldMatchData"});r("FAIL","Table "+t+" should match data",e)}return this}}}},console.log("SKYNET Automation Core Online - Created by Petros Plakogiannis, 2026"),function(){if(document.getElementById("skynet-overlay"))return;const e=document.createElement("div");if(e.id="skynet-overlay",e.style.cssText=["position:fixed","top:18px","right:18px","width:270px","height:150px","background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(60,0,0,.35),#050505 65%)","border:2px solid #ff2a2a","border-radius:14px","box-shadow:0 0 10px #ff2a2a, inset 0 0 28px rgba(255,0,0,.22)","z-index:999999","font-family:Consolas,monospace","overflow:hidden"].join(";"),e.innerHTML='\n      <div style="position:absolute;top:14px;left:18px;color:#ff3b3b;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-shadow:0 0 10px #ff0000">\n        SKYNET\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;bottom:16px;left:18px;color:#ff9a9a;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px">\n        AUTOMATION CORE ONLINE\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;right:18px;top:24px;width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,#ffb3b3 0,#ff4a4a 12%,#ff0000 28%,#450000 45%,#0c0000 60%,transparent 62%);box-shadow:0 0 12px #ff0000,0 0 28px rgba(255,0,0,.75),inset 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.18)">\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;right:58px;top:28px;width:12px;height:84px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.35),transparent);filter:blur(1px);animation:skynetEyePulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite">\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;right:21px;top:68px;width:86px;height:2px;background:#ff3b3b;box-shadow:0 0 8px #ff0000;animation:skynetScanX 2.2s linear infinite">\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;right:62px;top:27px;width:2px;height:86px;background:#ff3b3b;box-shadow:0 0 8px #ff0000;animation:skynetScanY 2.2s linear infinite">\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 0 6px,rgba(255,0,0,.04) 7px 8px);pointer-events:none">\n      </div>\n\n      <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:-60px;width:60px;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,0,0,.26),transparent);transform:skewX(-20deg);animation:skynetSweep 2.4s linear infinite">\n      </div>\n    ',!document.getElementById("skynet-style")){const e=document.createElement("style");e.id="skynet-style",e.textContent="\n        @keyframes skynetSweep {\n          0% { left: -60px; }\n          100% { left: 320px; }\n        }\n\n        @keyframes skynetEyePulse {\n          0%,100% { opacity: .55; transform: scaleY(.92); }\n          50% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(1); }\n        }\n\n        @keyframes skynetScanX {\n          0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }\n          50% { transform: translateY(-6px); }\n        }\n\n        @keyframes skynetScanY {\n          0%,100% { transform: translateX(0); }\n          50% { transform: translateX(6px); }\n        }\n      ",document.head.appendChild(e)}document.body.appendChild(e)}()}();
